summary: A highly detailed, project-specific AI prompt for generating professional interview-ready explanations of the LDM (Lal Dass Memorial) Academic ERP & Healthcare/Ayurveda Course Management System. The prompt is grounded in the actual codebase — referencing exact models, routes, utilities, and design decisions — so the AI can generate architecture-specific, non-generic answers that convincingly represent 3 years of full-stack experience.
